message:
fix: harden 8 sequence/ID counters with checked_add to prevent silent overflow

In release builds, plain += on u64 counters wraps silently. For ID
generators and sequence counters, overflow would cause ID collision
or break deterministic ordering. Replaced with checked_add + expect
to fail loud (matching virtual_time_wheel.rs precedent).

Files hardened:
- runtime/reactor/lab.rs (2 sites) — event sequence for heap ordering
- lab/oracle/finalizer.rs — FinalizerId uniqueness
- http/pool.rs — connection pool ID uniqueness
- runtime/kernel.rs — ControllerId uniqueness
- messaging/control.rs — ControlHandlerId uniqueness
- messaging/fabric.rs (2 sites) — publish + authoritative append sequence
- distributed/bridge.rs — snapshot sequence

Also records 14-file audit batch (lab, raptorq, scheduler, TLS, cancel).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
